---
title: "Bartholomew Elliott George Warburton"
---

## Bartholomew Elliott George Warburton

**Dates:** (1810-1852),

### Description

travel writer

### Biography

He had several brothers of whom one was CMY\'s friend the Rev. William Parsons Warburton.

### Letters

- Letter from October 29 [1849]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
